columns.extraction_plan: Table 2 (page 9) provides CRPC-free survival but not TTPSA. Methods (page 3) defines progression criteria but does not report TTPSA. Results (pages 5-7) state that PSA-related endpoints are still under investigation and not reported. The value is absent as it is not reported in the PDF.
